initial_entry.name: Interactivity
initial_entry.author: ichichikin
initial_entry.description: Interactivity allows you to run shell commands and scripts directly within your notes, providing their output right alongside your written content, making your note-taking process more dynamic and interactive.

current_entry.name: Interactivity: Calculations and Scripts
current_entry.author: ichichikin
current_entry.description: Interactivity lets you run local shell commands and scripts directly within your notes, providing the output alongside your written content. Use your favorite tools like Python, Node.js, Java, Perl, PHP, bash, or any other REPLs while taking notes.
